(3) Except where the contrary intention appears, the rules in this Part apply to parental order proceedings.


Textual Amendments


F2 Words in rule 13.1(2) inserted (3.1.2019) by The Human Fertilisation and Embryology Act 2008 (Remedial) Order 2018 (S.I. 2018/1413) , art. 1(1) , Sch. 2 para. 4(3)


F3 Words in rule 13.1(2) substituted (22.4.2014) by The Family Procedure (Amendment No. 3) Rules 2014 (S.I. 2014/843) , rules 1 , 30


### Application of Part 12 E+W


13.2. Rules F4 ... 12.19 and 12.21 apply as appropriate, with any necessary modifications, to parental order proceedings.


Textual Amendments


F4 Words in rule 13.2 omitted (22.4.2014) by virtue of The Family Procedure (Amendment No.3) Rules 2013 (S.I. 2013/3204) , rules 1 , 53 (with rule 137 ); S.I. 2014/954 , art. 2


### Who the parties are E+W


13.3. —(1) An application for a parental order [ F5 under section 54 of the 2008 Act ] may be made by such of the following who satisfy the conditions set out in section 54(1) of the 2008 Act—


[ F6 (1A) An application for a parental order under section 54A of the 2008 Act may only be made by one person who satisfies the conditions set out in subsection (1) of that section. ]


(2) The respondents to an application for a parental order are—


(3) The court will direct that a person with parental responsibility for the child be made a party to proceedings where that person requests to be one.


(4) The court may at any time direct that—


(5) If the court makes a direction for the addition or removal of a party, it may give consequential directions about—
